versions.version_description: This version is the one you will find when George Ezra plays it acoustic. Capo at 2nd fret is just a personal preference for singing.

tuning: D G C F A D
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  My house in Budapest, my[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  My hidden treasure chest[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  Golden grand piano[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  My beautiful Castillo[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You, ooh, you, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
I'd leave it all[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  My acres of a land,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I have achieved[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  It may be hard for you to[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  stop and believe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But for you, ooh, you, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
I'd leave it all[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, for you, ooh, you, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
I'd leave it all[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Give me one good reason[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Why I should never make a change[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
And baby, if you hold me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Then all of this will go away[/tab]
